title: GOTS Horror Pack
description: This ModPack is meant to scare you with a bunch of creepy / Scary mods. Also there is VR Support.
body:
This modpack is very similar to our Fabric version called "GOTS Spooky Scary", but with less overall mods and more horror themed mods that don't work in Fabric like: The End of Herobrine, Distant Friends, Etc.



main mods:

From the Fog datapack by: LunarEclipseStudios

The End of Herobrine by: Igow

Weeping Angels by: Suff99

Dark Waters by: AzureDoom



if you have any ideas on what to add, comment on one of our videos at 

### ***YouTube.com/@GOTS***
